ab: adaman kana wari, mukuwa ku i zekalr muzazangiya kani mulri na ma’inay.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: sawariyan mi lra ’azi marpana’u zi sare’ez ku kanintaw.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: i mulri mena’u kaninku mu, tu pakanay ku za taramunah, zi tu pa’away ku za alasepa.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: tu isalem ni mulri na ma’inay na taramunah mu salaw tavu’, tatena’ lra imaran.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: sahar ku ’emawu kana tu alasepa ni mulri na ma’inay, mawu ’inava nu ’emawu ta.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: a kara’alriyan azu mu, salrangan ku kani mulri na vavayan demuru za kara’alriyen.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: salaw sazu tu tinusasiyaw niyam kare’a’alriyen ni mulri na vavayan, ulra vulraw, ulra vuyu, ulra siyak zi ulra ziya dindin.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: piya mi kara’alri mu, mukuwa mi i padurina’an kikulanga.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: i mulri na vavayan melak za sazu a vurasi, vu’ir zi lukiyo veray kaninku tu paada kaninku muruma’.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: averuk ku lra zi marengay ku kanazu, zazuwa ku ziyan mena’uwa kaninmu ku kuwayaw marengay.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
